emails.subject: Re: CILCO STORAGE
emails.body: Re: CILCO STORAGE Yes, they are taken care of. But in the future we need to devise some sort of communication from Lisa Kinsey so if there is a change with Cilco, it is communicated to either you or me or Aimee or Kenny or someone and it is reflected on our withdrawal report. GG Daren J Farmer 03/21/2000 11:57 AM
